name: SOC CrowdStrike Falcon SaaS Integration Enhancement for Cortex XSIAM
description: Enhancements for CrowdStrike Falcon SaaS Falcon SaaS telemetry used by the SOC Framework on Cortex XSIAM. Reshapes events from `crowdstrike_falcon_event_raw` into properly-shaped XSIAM alerts with DS:CrowdStrike Falcon SaaS/Falcon SaaS tags so Foundation Product Classification routes them into the Cloud category.
author: Palo Alto Networks
